description: CompositionGreen Basketball cap made of 100% cotton, with an adjustable strap at the back, reinforced fabric strips stitched for added durability and branding embroidered in white on the frontWash careDry clean onlyYou don't have to be in the basketball team to wear a basketball cap; it'll look good on anyone. Impress family, friends, and co-workers with this simple, yet elegant cap from wrangler. The cap features the wrangler 'w' embroidered on the front for maximum style, while you can customise the Fit with the adjustable strap. Wear it with your sporting clothes or casual wear when you go out in the sun to keep the tan away and look stylish at the same time.
